# Auth + Module Access Incident Backlog

Scope: stabilize module visibility and ownership invariants after the post-auth
permission-resolution regression identified in the auth/permissions workstream.

- Incident artifact: [`US-AUTH-incident-backlog.md`](US-AUTH-incident-backlog.md)
- Primary module scope: `hub`, `admin`, `design-system`, and cross-module route
  access control
- Owner of workstream: Auth + Permissions hardening stream
- Last updated: 2026-04-25

Keep this folder as the single source of truth for auth incident hardening stories
and immediate gates. Move any active auth-specific stories here when they are
reintroduced or reprioritized.
